news.t: 5 Foreign Dividends Trump Is Making Great Again (Yields Up To 9.3%)

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Bloomberg International Corporate Bond ETF (IBND) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of investment grade corporate bonds from outside the United States. IBND was launched on May 19, 2010 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: Bloomberg Global Aggregate x USD >$1B: Corporate Bond

data.title: 5 Foreign Dividends Trump Is Making Great Again (Yields Up To 9.3%)
data.text: Don't buy all the “America First” talk coming out of DC. Truth is, Uncle Sam's recent moves are quietly making foreign bonds—especially the 5 bond funds (yielding up to 9.3%!
